data.title: BTC Price Bottomed? 5 Key Signs Say Yes Despite $1B Daily Profit-Taking
data.description:
Since early 2024, Bitcoin’s 7 days moving average of net realized profit/loss has been strongly positive. The metric also records profit of over $1 billion a day, this is after BTC price recovered from the March – April 2025 correction, according to CryptoQuant data.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/07/btc-price-bottomed-5-key-signs-say-yes-despite-1b-daily-profit-taking/

data.description:
Robinhood Markets Inc. is developing a blockchain platform that would allow European investors to trade tokenized U. S. stocks. The global interest in tokenized assets is on the rise, and among other companies, Robinhood is buying into the wave with its plan to launch a blockchain-based platform that allows its customers to trade tokenized assets. data.title: Stripe rolls out stablecoin accounts in over 100 countries
data.description:
Stripe, a global payments platform, has introduced stablecoin-based accounts to clients in over 100 countries. According to a May 7 announcement, the new feature will allow the platform's clients "to send, receive, and hold US-dollar stablecoin account balances, similar to how a traditional fiat bank account works. "The product's technical page shows that the new account feature will support Circle's USDC (USDC) and Bridge's USDB (USDB) stablecoins. Stripe acquired the Bridge platform in October 2024
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/stripe-announces-stablecoin-financial-accounts?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair Powell Clarifies Meeting Protocol with U.S. President
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has stated that he has never requested a meeting with the U.S. President Donald Trump and will not do so in the future. Powell emphasized that all meetings with the President are conducted at the President's invitation.

data.title: OpenAI Launches Global AI Development Initiative
data.description:
According to Odaily, OpenAI has announced a new AI development initiative called 'OpenAI for Countries.' This plan aims to establish AI infrastructure projects in collaboration with nations worldwide. Earlier this year, on January 21, U.S. President Donald Trump announced a $500 billion investment in the 'Stargate project,' involving OpenAI, SoftBank, and Oracle. OpenAI now seeks to replicate similar projects globally, offering customized versions of ChatGPT to enhance sectors such as healthcare, education, and law.

OpenAI's goal for the first phase of 'OpenAI for Countries' is to initiate ten projects with various countries or regions, with plans for further expansion. The initiative underscores OpenAI's commitment to advancing AI technology and fostering international cooperation in its development.

data.title: Payments Giant Visa Invests in Stablecoin Infrastructure Firm BVNK in US Market Expansion
data.description:
Credit card giant Visa is investing in the stablecoin payments network BVNK as a means of upgrading its business-to-business transactions.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/07/payments-giant-visa-invests-in-stablecoin-infrastructure-firm-bvnk-in-us-market-expansion/

data.title: Powell: Never asked for a meeting with the president and will never do so
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell said he had never asked for a meeting with the president and would never do so, and all meetings with the president were at the president's invitation.

data.title: Galaxy Digital Partners with Zodia Custody to Expand Staking Services in Europe
data.description: Galaxy Digital has announced that it has integrated Zodia Custody to strengthen its staking business in Europe. Zodia is an institutional-grade blockchain services provider backed by Standard Chartered, State Street, SBI Holdings, National Australia Bank and Emirates NBD. The partnership “lays the foundation for future collaborations”, including exchange-traded products that combine staking and lending capabilities. Galaxy said: “By combining Zodia Custody’s security and risk framework with Galaxy’s leading capabilities in staking and trading, we offer institutions a differentiated and simplified way to engage, while complying with regional custody and regulatory requirements.”

data.title: OpenAI launches global version of Stargate
data.description: Early this morning, OpenAI announced a new AI development plan on its official website - OpenAI for Countries. On January 21 of this year, Trump announced at the White House that OpenAI, SoftBank, Oracle and others would jointly invest $500 billion in the "Stargate project". Now, OpenAI hopes to establish a similar project for every country in the world, work with them to develop AI infrastructure, and provide a professional customized version of ChatGPT to improve medical care, education, law and other fields. OpenAI stated that in promoting the "OpenAI for Countries" plan, its goal is to carry out 10 projects with various countries or regions in the first phase of the plan, and further expand on this basis. (AIGC Open Community)

data.title: OCC: Banks Can Buy and Sell Their Customers' Crypto Assets Held in Custody
data.description:
The U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency, which regulates national banks, has continued its about-face to earlier resistance to cryptocurrency in banking, issuing interpretive letters that say the institutions can — at their customers' behest — buy and sell crypto assets in custody.The newly explained policy stance released by the OCC on Wednesday also clarified that the bankers can outsource crypto activities to third parties, including custody and executive services
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2025/05/07/occ-banks-can-buy-and-sell-their-customers-crypto-assets-held-in-custody

data.title: $MELANIA Lightning Buy Nets Traders $100M in 150 Seconds, Financial Times Reveals
data.description:
Financial Times has alleged coordinated trading after 24 wallets spent $2. 6 m on $MELANIA less than three minutes before Melania Trump revealed the token on Truth Social, a move that has delivered about $100 m in gains and intensified Senate probes into President Trump’s crypto fundraising.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/melania-100m-150-second-buy/

data.title: Falling DXY part of US financial system’s ‘long-term transition’ — Will Bitcoin continue to shine?
data.description:
What to know:Lyn Alden says a weaker dollar is necessary for the US to stabilize its financial system. Bitcoin and gold are well-positioned to benefit from de-dollarization. Sovereign wealth funds and various nations are already increasing their Bitcoin exposure as the dollar’s global dominance starts to wane. The weakening of the US dollar (DXY) is no longer headline news
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/falling-dxy-part-of-us-financial-system-s-long-term-transition-will-bitcoin-continue-to-shine?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
